text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 4 

ALCO_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: Alcohol Use Disorders First Ever Occurrence Date — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the alcohol use disorders 
indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have never had the condition. 

SHORT NAME: ALCO_MEDICARE_EVER
